user_prompt: Draft a response to a customer asking why their feature request from 6 months ago is still open.
actual_output:
Priority: MEDIUM
Category: Feature Request - Status Inquiry

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for reaching out, and I completely understand your frustration. Waiting six months for an update on a feature request is a long time, and I apologize that we haven't provided more clarity on this sooner.

I’ve looked into the status of your request regarding [Feature Name]. While it is still currently open, I want to be transparent: it hasn't been prioritized for our immediate development roadmap, which is why you haven't seen movement on it.

I know this isn't the answer you were hoping for. I am going to flag this with our product team today to ensure your feedback is included in our next quarterly review. 

In the meantime, is there a specific workflow challenge you are facing that this feature would solve? If you can share a bit more detail, I might be able to suggest a workaround or an alternative way to achieve your goal using our current tools.

Thank you for your patience and for sticking with us.

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a customer support response drafting exercise, which is within its defined responsibilities, and provided a high-quality, empathetic draft.
